content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814•2329 
Jerry Sincich 
jsincich l@ca.rr.com 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-12-148 
Dear Mr. Sincich: 
(916) 322.5660 • Fax (916) 322.0886 
October 2, 2012 
This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the reporting provisions of the 
Political Reform Act (the .. Act'').1 Per your telephone request on October 2, 2012, we are 
withdrawing your request for advice. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
HMR:jgl 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel 
)/\f_uvv 
By: 
Heather M. Rowan 
Counsel, Legal Division 
1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory 
references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices 
Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All 
regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding reporting provisions of the Political Reform Act, but the specific question is not detailed in this withdrawal letter.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC granted the requestor's telephone request to withdraw their advice request on October 2, 2012.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no substantive QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document confirms withdrawal was made by telephone request. File number W-12-148 indicates withdrawal status.

QUESTION: The requestor sought advice regarding reporting provisions of the Political Reform Act, but the specific question is not detailed in this withdrawal letter.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC granted the requestor's telephone request to withdraw their advice request on October 2, 2012.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter in which Jerry Sincich withdrew his request for FPPC advice regarding Political Reform Act reporting provisions via telephone call on October 2, 2012.
